of recovery rather than on any subjective considerations;

controls.control_description:
In case of constraints

borrowers, a bank shall furnish evidence to show that renewal/ review of credit
limits is already on and would be completed soon.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish evidence to show that renewal/ review of credit limits is already on and would be completed soon

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mandatory in cases of npas with balance of ₹5 crore and above in order to enhance the reliability on stock valuation and bring down divergence aris
controls.control_description:
Stock audit at annual intervals by external agencies appointed as per the
guidelines approved by the Board shall be mandatory in cases of NPAs with
balance of ₹5 crore and above in order to enhance the reliability on stock
valuation and bring down divergence arising out of difference in assessment of
the value of security.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mandatory in cases of npas with balance of ₹5 crore and above in order to enhance the reliability on stock valuation and bring down divergence aris

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued once in three years by valuers appointed as per the guidelines approved by the board of directors
controls.control_description:
In case of NPAs with balance of ₹5 crore and above, collaterals such as
immovable properties charged in favour of the bank shall be valued once in three
years by valuers appointed as per the guidelines approved by the Board of
Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be valued once in three years by valuers appointed as per the guidelines approved by the board of directors

A bank shall classify a loan or an advance as NPA if any of the following

more than 90 days in respect of a term loan;

current MTM of a derivative contract before its maturity, only the current
credit exposure (not the potential future exposure) shall be classified as

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as a non-performing asset after an overdue period of 90 days

Provided further that in cases where a bank partially or fully terminates
the derivative contract before maturity, at their discretion, based on

derivative contract, and the bank permitted payment in instalments of the

Contracts), the recievable shall be classified as non-performing asset: (i)
if the amount becomes overdue for 90 days from the date of partial / full
termination of the derivative contract;

A bank should not classify an advance account as NPA merely due to the

controls.control_description:
The bills discounted under Letter of Credit (LC) favouring a borrower may not be
classified as NPA, when any other facility granted to the borrower is classified as
NPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as npa

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately be classified as npa with effect from the date when the other facilities had been classified as npa
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding paragraph 37, in case documents under LC are not accepted
on presentation or the payment under the LC is not made on the due date by the
LC issuing bank for any reason and the borrower does not immediately make
<image>
good the amount disbursed as a result of discounting of concerned bills, the
outstanding bills discounted shall immediately be classified as NPA with effect
from the date when the other facilities had been classified as NPA.

swaps and options become NPAs, all other funded facilities granted to
